benchmarks.description: Word count 256 KB buffer x 200

benchmarks.description: Sum of squares 1..100000 x 200

benchmarks.description: Collatz steps 1..100000 x 10

benchmarks.description: Prime count up to 50000 x 200

benchmarks.description: 32x32 int32 matrix multiply x 200 (Mettle: 4-unrolled pointers; C: naive mat_idx â€” GCC -O3 vectorizes C heavily)

benchmarks.name: sort_insertion

benchmarks.description: memcpy 256 KB buffer x 200 (memory bandwidth / libc memcpy path)

benchmarks.name: memset_bench
benchmarks.description: memset 256 KB buffer x 200 (fill bandwidth / libc memset path)

benchmarks.name: memcmp_bench
benchmarks.description: Byte-compare 256 KB in 4 KB chunks x 200 (manual compare loop)

benchmarks.name: binary_search
benchmarks.description: Lower-bound search in sorted 65536 int32 array, 50000 queries x 200

benchmarks.name: dot_product
benchmarks.description: int32 dot product of 65536-element vectors x 200 (SIMD reduction)

benchmarks.name: lcg_rng
benchmarks.description: LCG PRNG 1M iterations x 200 (integer mul/add hot loop)

benchmarks.name: prefix_sum
benchmarks.description: Inclusive prefix sum over 65536 int32 values x 200 (scan / SIMD)

benchmarks.name: popcount
benchmarks.description: Population count over 256 KB byte buffer x 200 (bit ops)

benchmarks.name: reverse_i32
benchmarks.description: Reverse-copy 65536 int32 values x 200 (indexed memory access)

benchmarks.name: minmax_scan
benchmarks.description: Min/max scan over 65536 int32 values x 200 (branchy reduction)

benchmarks.name: scale_i32

benchmarks.name: clamp_i32
benchmarks.description: clamp(src[i], -100, 100) over 65536 int32 values x 200 (branchy map)

benchmarks.name: float_sum
benchmarks.description: float64 sum reduction 65536 elems x 4000 (FP auto-vectorization gap)

benchmarks.name: mandelbrot
benchmarks.description: Mandelbrot 600x400, 256 iters x 30 (float64-heavy branchy inner loop)

benchmarks.description: Recursive fib(34) x 5 (raw function-call overhead, no inlining)

benchmarks.description: 64-bit div+mod 2M iters x 40 (long-latency DIV throughput)

benchmarks.name: leaf_call

benchmarks.description: Indirect fn-ptr call 60M x 5 (indirect-call ABI cost)

benchmarks.name: saxpy

benchmarks.name: fp_div
